prompt: Ultra-realistic quiet luxury brand magazine cover featuring a refined Korean woman in a head-to-toe Bottega Veneta look — a clay-toned oversized woven leather jacket over a chocolate brown silk blouse — cradling the iconic Bottega Veneta Intrecciato Jodie bag in woven clay leather against her chest with both arms wrapped gently around it, eyes slightly downcast in a contemplative luxury mood. Flawless warm-toned skin, understated glam, terracotta tinted lip. Low effortless chignon. Background: seamless warm caramel travertine stone studio, soft even directional light. "GQ STYLE" masthead in minimal editorial sans-serif with "QUIET LUXURY ISSUE" callout. 85mm lens, ultra-detailed intrecciato weave leather texture, 8K photorealistic.
promptEn: Ultra-realistic quiet luxury brand magazine cover featuring a refined Korean woman in a head-to-toe Bottega Veneta look — a clay-toned oversized woven leather jacket over a chocolate brown silk blouse — cradling the iconic Bottega Veneta Intrecciato Jodie bag in woven clay leather against her chest with both arms wrapped gently around it, eyes slightly downcast in a contemplative luxury mood. Flawless warm-toned skin, understated glam, terracotta tinted lip. Low effortless chignon. Background: seamless warm caramel travertine stone studio, soft even directional light. "GQ STYLE" masthead in minimal editorial sans-serif with "QUIET LUXURY ISSUE" callout. 85mm lens, ultra-detailed intrecciato weave leather texture, 8K photorealistic.
promptZh: 超写实静奢风品牌杂志封面，主角为一位气质优雅的 韩国女性，身着全套 Bottega Veneta 服饰——陶土色超大编织皮夹克内搭巧克力棕色丝绸衬衫——双臂轻柔地环抱着标志性的 Bottega Veneta Intrecciato Jodie 编织皮包，眼神微垂，流露出沉思的奢华氛围。肤色无瑕且色调温暖，妆容低调高级，配以赤陶色唇妆。发型为随性的低发髻。背景：无缝暖焦糖色洞石摄影棚，光线柔和均匀。杂志刊头为极简无衬线字体的“GQ STYLE”，并带有“QUIET LUXURY ISSUE”字样。85mm 镜头，超精细的 Intrecciato 编织皮革纹理，8K 照片级画质。
